title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on platform stability improvements that make OpsPal more reliable for your daily RevOps work. We fixed several issues that were causing automation failures in Salesforce and HubSpot, and resolved problems with system updates that could interrupt your workflows.

entries.headline: Salesforce automations now handle state and country fields more reliably
details: OpsPal now automatically detects when Salesforce organizations use special state and country field settings, preventing automation failures that could occur when these fields are configured differently than expected.

entries.headline: Multi-step Salesforce deployments now run more smoothly
details: Complex Salesforce configuration changes that require multiple steps now execute more reliably, reducing the chance of partial deployments or stuck processes.

entries.headline: HubSpot automations work again after recent outage
details: Restored HubSpot functionality that was temporarily broken, ensuring all your HubSpot-related automations and data syncing work as expected.
